confidentialite.meta_description: TechPlay privacy policy and personal data protection. GDPR, cookies, your rights.
confidentialite.section_intro_content: This privacy policy describes how TechPlay SAS (we) collects, uses and protects the personal data of users of the TechPlay website (the Site). It is in line with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.
confidentialite.section_responsable_content: The data controller is TechPlay SAS, 12 rue de la Boutique, 75001 Paris, France. For any question about your personal data: support@techplay.fr or via the Contact page.
confidentialite.section_donnees_content: We may collect: identity and contact details (name, email, address, phone) when you order or use the contact form; connection data (IP address, logs) for security and Site operation; browsing data and cookies (see Cookies section); order and payment data (history, amounts), payment being processed by our secure provider (Stripe).
confidentialite.section_finalites_content: Data is used to: process and track your orders; manage customer relations and support; send confirmations and invoices; improve our services and the Site; produce audience statistics; and, with your consent, send you offers and news (newsletter, marketing).
confidentialite.section_bases_content: Processing is based on: contract performance (orders, delivery); your consent (non-essential cookies, newsletter); our legitimate interest (security, service improvement, statistics); and legal obligations (invoicing, retention).
confidentialite.section_destinataires_content: Data is accessible to authorised internal departments of TechPlay SAS and, where relevant, to our service providers (hosting, payment, email, analytics) under strict agreements. Some providers may be located outside the EU; appropriate safeguards (standard clauses, adequacy decisions) are in place. Data is not sold to third parties.
confidentialite.section_duree_content: Data is kept for as long as necessary for the purposes: order and invoicing data: 10 years (legal obligations); contact form data: for the time needed to process the request then archiving or deletion; cookies: as indicated in the cookie banner; marketing data: until you withdraw consent or object. Beyond that, data is deleted or anonymised.
confidentialite.section_droits_content: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, portability and to object, as well as to withdraw your consent at any time. To exercise them: support@techplay.fr or by post to our registered office. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (e.g. CNIL for France). For email marketing, you can unsubscribe via the link at the bottom of each message.
confidentialite.section_cookies_content: The Site uses cookies and trackers for technical operation (session, preferences), audience measurement and, with your consent, advertising and targeting. You can manage your preferences via the cookie banner on your first visit or via your browser settings. Refusing certain cookies may limit some Site features.
confidentialite.section_securite_content: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration (restricted access, encryption, secure hosting, certified payment provider).
confidentialite.section_modifications_content: We reserve the right to update this policy to reflect legal or practical changes. The current version is the one published on the Site. We invite you to check it regularly.
confidentialite.section_contact_content: For any question about this policy or your data: support@techplay.fr, contact form on the Site, or by post to TechPlay SAS, 12 rue de la Boutique, 75001 Paris, France.
confidentialite.cookie_banner_hint: You can manage your preferences via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page.

mentions_legales.meta_description: TechPlay legal notice: publisher, hosting, personal data, cookies, applicable law.
mentions_legales.section_editeur_content: The TechPlay website (the Site) is published by TechPlay SAS, with registered office at 12 rue de la Boutique, 75001 Paris, France. RCS Paris 123 456 789. VAT: FR 12 345678 901. The Site is protected by copyright.
mentions_legales.section_hebergeur_content: The Site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States. Contact the host via its official website for availability questions.
mentions_legales.section_directeur_content: The publication director is the legal representative of TechPlay SAS.
mentions_legales.section_contact_content: Contact: TechPlay SAS, 12 rue de la Boutique, 75001 Paris, France; support@techplay.fr; or the contact form on the Site.
mentions_legales.section_ci_content: All Site elements are protected by copyright and trademark law. Reproduction or use without written authorisation from TechPlay SAS is prohibited. Trademarks and logos on the Site are registered.
mentions_legales.section_data_content: Personal data is processed in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). Controller: TechPlay SAS. You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection. Contact support@techplay.fr or see our privacy policy. You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
mentions_legales.section_cookies_content: The Site uses cookies for operation, analytics and, with consent, advertising. Manage preferences via the cookie banner or browser settings. See our privacy policy for details.
mentions_legales.section_mediateur_content: Consumers may use the consumer mediation scheme for amicable resolution. ODR platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
mentions_legales.section_droit_content: This legal notice is governed by French law. French courts have exclusive jurisdiction.
mentions_legales.section_credits_content: Site: TechPlay team. Hosting: Vercel Inc.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions
cgv.meta_description: TechPlay terms and conditions: orders, payment, delivery, returns, warranties.
cgv.intro: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (GTCS) apply to all orders placed on the TechPlay website. By placing an order, the customer accepts these GTCS without reservation.
cgv.art1_content: These GTCS govern the sale of products by TechPlay SAS (the Seller) to buyers (the Customer) via the TechPlay website (the Site). Any order implies full acceptance of these GTCS.
cgv.art2_content: The products offered are those displayed on the Site on the date of viewing. Photographs and descriptions are as accurate as possible. Offers are valid subject to availability.
cgv.art3_content: Prices are in euros including applicable taxes (French VAT). Delivery costs are shown before order validation and may be free above a certain order value. The applicable price is that in force at the time of order validation.
cgv.art4_content: The Customer selects products, adds them to the cart and validates the order after checking the summary. The order is final only after payment confirmation. The Seller may refuse any order for legitimate reasons.
cgv.art5_content: Payment is made online by card or other means offered on the Site, via a secure solution (Stripe). Amounts are charged at validation. If payment is declined, the order is cancelled.
cgv.art6_content: Delivery times are indicative and run from payment validation. Risk passes to the Customer upon handover to the carrier. The Customer must check the parcel on delivery and report any anomaly.
cgv.art7_content: The consumer Customer has 14 calendar days from receipt to exercise the right of withdrawal without giving a reason. Products must be returned in their original condition within 14 days of notification. Refund is made within 14 days of receipt of the products or proof of dispatch. Certain products may be excluded as permitted by law.
cgv.art8_content: The Seller is bound by legal warranties of conformity and hidden defects. In case of non-conformity, the Customer may request repair, replacement, price reduction or rescission within the legal time limits.
cgv.art9_content: Any complaint or after-sales request must be sent to customer service (support@techplay.fr or contact form). In case of dispute, the Customer may use consumer mediation (see legal notice).
cgv.art10_content: The Seller liability is limited to the amount of the order. It cannot be held liable for indirect damage except in case of gross fault. The Customer is responsible for the use made of the products.
cgv.art11_content: Data collected in the context of the order is processed in accordance with the GDPR and the Site privacy policy. The Customer has rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection. See the legal notice.
cgv.art12_content: These GTCS are governed by French law. For consumer Customers in the EU, the mandatory provisions of their country of residence remain applicable. Any dispute may be submitted to the competent courts or consumer mediation.
cgv.art13_content: The Seller reserves the right to amend these GTCS. The conditions applicable are those in force on the order date. Amendments are brought to Customers attention by publication on the Site.
